debug_info.goal:
K : Type u_1
inst✝⁸ : Field K
inst✝⁷ : NumberField K
B : Type u_2
inst✝⁶ : Ring B
inst✝⁵ : Algebra K B
inst✝⁴ : FiniteDimensional K B
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace (TensorProduct K B (FiniteAdeleRing (RingOfIntegers K) K))
inst✝² : BorelSpace (TensorProduct K B (FiniteAdeleRing (RingOfIntegers K) K))
inst✝¹ : IsSimpleRing B
inst✝ : Algebra.IsCentral K B
u : (TensorProduct K B (FiniteAdeleRing (RingOfIntegers K) K))ˣ
this✝¹ : Module.FinitePresentation K B
v : HeightOneSpectrum (RingOfIntegers K) := sorry
u' : (TensorProduct K B (adicCompletion K v))ˣ := sorry
this✝ : MeasurableSpace (TensorProduct K B (adicCompletion K v)) := borel (TensorProduct K B (adicCompletion K v))
this : BorelSpace (TensorProduct K B (adicCompletion K v))
hf : ringHaarChar u' = addEquivAddHaarChar (ContinuousAddEquiv.mulRight u')
⊢ addEquivAddHaarChar (ContinuousAddEquiv.mulLeft u) = addEquivAddHaarChar (ContinuousAddEquiv.mulRight u)

failed_attempts:
· ext x
    simp only [u', e, ContinuousAddEquiv.mulLeft_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.toContinuousAddEquiv_apply,
      ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_toContinuousAddEquiv, ContinuousAddEquiv.symm_trans_apply,
      ContinuousAddEquiv.trans_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_coe,
      AlgEquiv.toUnits_map_apply, AlgEquiv.toLinearEquiv_apply,
      Algebra.TensorProduct.comm_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.comm_symm_apply]
    simp only [Algebra.TensorProduct.comm_tmul, Algebra.TensorProduct.comm_symm_tmul]
  · ext x
    simp only [u', e, ContinuousAddEquiv.mulRight_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.toContinuousAddEquiv_apply,
      ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_toContinuousAddEquiv, ContinuousAddEquiv.symm_trans_apply,
      ContinuousAddEquiv.trans_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_coe,
      AlgEquiv.toUnits_map_apply, AlgEquiv.toLinearEquiv_apply,
      Algebra.TensorProduct.comm_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.comm_symm_apply]
    simp only [Algebra.TensorProduct.comm_tmul, Algebra.TensorProduct.comm_symm_tmul]

let e := Algebra.TensorProduct.comm K B (FiniteAdeleRing (𝓞 K) K)
  let E : (B ⊗[K] (FiniteAdeleRing (𝓞 K) K)) ≃+ₜ ((FiniteAdeleRing (𝓞 K) K) ⊗[K] B) :=
    { e.toAddEquiv with
      continuous_toFun := sorry
      continuous_invFun := sorry }
  let u_symm := e.toRingEquiv.toUnits.map u
  have h_conj : ∀ (f : (FiniteAdeleRing (𝓞 K) K ⊗[K] B) ≃+ₜ (FiniteAdeleRing (𝓞 K) K ⊗[K] B)),
      addEquivAddHaarChar (E.symm.trans (f.trans E)) = addEquivAddHaarChar f := by
    intro f
    rw [addEquivAddHaarChar_trans, addEquivAddHaarChar_trans, mul_comm, ← mul_assoc,
      ← addEquivAddHaarChar_trans, ContinuousAddEquiv.self_trans_symm, addEquivAddHaarChar_refl, one_mul]
  have hL : addEquivAddHaarChar (ContinuousAddEquiv.mulLeft u) = addEquivAddHaarChar (ContinuousAddEquiv.mulLeft u_symm) := by
    rw [← h_conj]
    congr; ext; simp [u_symm, e, E, Algebra.TensorProduct.comm_apply]
  have hR : addEquivAddHaarChar (ContinuousAddEquiv.mulRight u) = addEquivAddHaarChar (ContinuousAddEquiv.mulRight u_symm) := by
    rw [← h_conj]
    congr; ext; simp [u_symm, e, E, Algebra.TensorProduct.comm_apply]
  rw [hL, hR]
  apply NumberField.FiniteAdeleRing.tensor_isCentralSimple_addHaarScalarFactor_left_mul_eq_right_mul

simp only [u', map_mul, AlgEquiv.toRingEquiv_eq_coe, RingEquiv.toUnits_map_apply,
      RingEquiv.coe_toUnits, AlgEquiv.coe_ringEquiv, AlgEquiv.apply_symm_apply]
  
  rw [hL, hR]
  exact NumberField.FiniteAdeleRing.tensor_isCentralSimple_addHaarScalarFactor_left_mul_eq_right_mul K B u'

simp only [Algebra.TensorProduct.comm_symm_apply]
    rfl
  · ext x
    simp only [ContinuousAddEquiv.trans_apply, ContinuousAddEquiv.symm_apply_apply,

    simp only [Algebra.TensorProduct.comm_symm_apply]
    rfl
